scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,ui -c green,cyan "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:ui"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,ui,electron -c green,cyan,magenta "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:ui" "bun run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/liner-server && LINER_RPC_MODE=mock LINER_MANAGED_ENGINE=0 bun run dev
scripts.build: bun run build:core && bun run build:ui && bun run build:electron
scripts.build:desktop: bun run bundle:api && bun run build && cd apps/liner-electron && bun run dist
scripts.build:desktop:bundled: bun run bundle:api && bun run build && bun run build:engine && bun run prepare:runtime && cd apps/liner-electron && bun run dist
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:core && bun run typecheck:ui && bun run typecheck:electron
